title: AgentSummary
description: Compact summary of an agent returned by GET /aep/agents. Enough to browse and filter; retrieve the full AgentContract via GET /aep/agents/{agentId} for details.

version.description: SemVer identifier for this agent revision.

description.description: Brief description suitable for list rendering.

riskTier.description: Minimal risk tier info (level only). Full risk rationale is in the contract.

domains.description: Domain IDs from the capabilities registry. Used for filtering.

supportedModes.description: Evaluation modes this agent supports. Derived from the Agent Contract's evaluationModes.

authorizedModes.description: Subset of supportedModes the CALLING IDENTITY is authorised to use. May be smaller than supportedModes based on caller's permissions.

supportedExtensions.description: Optional extensions this agent declares support for.

owner.description: Minimal ownership info for routing findings.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last change to this agent's contract. Used by clients for incremental sync via ?updatedSince=.

contractUrl.description: Direct link to the full AgentContract (typically /aep/agents/{agentId}).
